# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# +1 points
# You lift the corner of the doormat and find an iron key hidden underneath.
> look under mat
# Pick up the iron key
> take iron key
# Unlock the door
# You unlock the front door.
> unlock door with iron key
# You open the front door.
> open door

## Hallway

> east

# +1 points
# You rummage through the coat pockets and find a matchbook.
> search overcoat

## Study

> east

# Open the desk
# You open the heavy desk, revealing a winding key.
> open desk
# +1 points
> take winding key
# You slide the painting aside, revealing a small wall safe set into the wall.
> push painting
# +1 points
# You strike a match and hold it to the logs. They catch quickly, filling the
#   room with flickering warmth.
> burn fireplace
# In the firelight you can make out numbers scratched into the stone: 7-3-9.
> examine hearthstone
# +1 points
# You dial 7-3-9. The safe clicks open.
> open safe
# Pick up the spring
> take spring

> south

> take trowel
# +1 points
# You dig into the soft earth and uncover a small brass mechanism wrapped in
#   oilcloth. It's the innards of a music box.
> dig flower bed
# Pick up the mechanism
> take mechanism

## Attic

> up

# Store the mechanism in the music box
# You put the mechanism into the old music box.
> put mechanism in music box
# Store the spring in the music box
# You put the clock spring into the old music box.
> put spring in music box
# +2 points
# You insert the butterfly key into the keyhole and wind the music box. The
#   gears catch and a delicate melody fills the attic.
> wind music box
# GAME WON
# You lift the locket from the trunk. Inside, your grandmother smiles back at
#   you from a faded photograph. This is what she wanted you to have.
> take locket
